title: A Request
content:
When I am cold and undesirous and my lids lie dead,
    Come to watch by the body that loved you and say:
    This is Rondagui, whom I killed and my heart regrets for ever.

    From the Persian of Rondagui (tenth century).
meaning:
Edward Powys Mathers (As Translator)'s contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "A Request"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
